response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with a strong web/backend background (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang), but does not meet the core requirements of this role. C++ exposure is limited to a 7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015 and a thesis project — far short of the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. There is no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking systems experience (RIDE Capital was a Node.js fintech product, not capital markets), and no SQL Server/Oracle depth is evidenced.
strengths: Solid overall engineering experience (15+ years) with systems-level exposure via DLang low-latency work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong software craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
Good communication skills demonstrated through workshops, conference talks, and teaching
concerns: No substantial or recent C++ experience, and none on the Windows platform as required
No fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets domain knowledge
SQL experience is MongoDB/MySQL-oriented, with no demonstrated SQL Server or Oracle background

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain expertise
Low-latency systems and CI/CD craftsmanship background
